    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TelemetryRuleDTO>
    TelemetryRuleController.createRule(Long resourceId, TelemetryRuleRequest request, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Creates a monitoring rule on a resource.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TelemetryRuleDTO>
    TelemetryRuleController.updateRule(Long id, TelemetryRuleRequest patch, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Partially updates a rule (only the fields present in the body are changed).
